_comment_hierarchical: Set to true to group files by model/scenario/frequency/variable into single datasets. Set to false to create individual datasets for each NetCDF file.
_comment_example: With your EC-Earth3 data, this will create 2 datasets: 1) EC-Earth3 SSP245 RSDS (86 yearly files), 2) EC-Earth3 SSP245 TASMIN (86 yearly files)
